allowStripePaymentLink.description: Stripe Checkout for platform invoices is not wired end-to-end yet; the flag is stored for future use and API symmetry with YooKassa.

unit.description: UOM; if empty and catalog linked, defaults from catalog

unitPriceInclVatMinor.description: If nil with a catalog line, defaults to catalog default price; if non-nil (including *0), that value is used as-is.

allowStripePaymentLink.description: Stripe Checkout for platform invoices is not wired end-to-end yet; the flag is stored for future use and API symmetry with YooKassa.

accessToken.description: legacy field name; same JWT as token

allowInstantPurchase.description: When omitted or null, defaults to true.

displayOrder.description: Sort order for public plan lists (lower values first). When omitted or null, defaults to 1000.

isPromoted.description: IsPromoted when true: this plan becomes the only promoted tier (others cleared in the same transaction).

isPublic.description: When omitted or null, defaults to true (backward compatible).

isPromoted.description: IsPromoted omitted: leave unchanged. When true, other plans are demoted in the same transaction.

companySlug.description: optional; if empty, generated from company name

planCode.description: optional, defaults to starter with trial

counterparty.description: legal profile (RU): partyType, inn, addresses, etc.

isSaasOperator.description: single operator tenant per deployment; quotas bypassed

opaqueLoginLinksOnly.description: OpaqueLoginLinksOnly: deep links should use TenantLoginLink tokens instead of slug-based branding.

slug.description: public tenant slug for login URLs

ssoJitProvisioning.description: SsoJitProvisioning: allow creating a user on first successful SSO when policy permits.

strictPublicTenantResolve.description: StrictPublicTenantResolve: SaaS-enabled — GET /public/tenants/{slug} does not expose org metadata for slug guessing.

serviceZoneId.description: ServiceZoneID: when set, this counter serves only the waiting pool for that service_zone (direct child of UnitID).

targetUnits.description: Stored permissions to be assigned upon acceptance (JSONB; OpenAPI as generic object)

amount.description: total in minor units (gross); equals sum of line gross when lines exist

unit.description: Print UOM (DB column unit). Renamed from "Unit" to avoid GORM confusion with models.Unit in this package.

externalEventHref.description: Calendar (CalDAV) mirror: booking is tied to a specific event resource.

calendarIntegrationId.description: CalendarIntegrationID identifies which calendar connection to use when the unit has multiple.

externalEventHref.description: ExternalEventHref is required for units with calendar integration (identifies the CalDAV resource).
When rescheduling with calendar integration, provide the new CalDAV slot (same as create).

status.description: Status optional; only "canceled" is accepted to cancel an active pre-registration.

calendarSlotKey.description:
CalendarSlotKey optional label segment in [QQ] SUMMARY when names collide (calendar integration).
When non-empty (after trim), it must be unique per unit — enforced by DB partial unique index and create/update validation.

restrictedServiceZoneId.description: RestrictedServiceZoneID: when set, this leaf service is only offered in that service_zone's waiting pool (child of UnitID subdivision).

pendingEffectiveAt.description: UTC; when reached, PlanID moves to pending plan

allowInstantPurchase.description: AllowInstantPurchase when false: plan may still be public, but checkout is disabled until a sales-led flow exists.

displayOrder.description: DisplayOrder is used for public plan lists (lower values first).

isPromoted.description: IsPromoted marks the single catalog recommended plan (marketing + in-app pricing highlight).

limitsNegotiable.description: LimitsNegotiable maps limit keys to true when the catalog should show “by agreement” instead of a numeric cap.

name.description: Primary display name (e.g. Russian on RU marketing)

createdByName.description: CreatedByName is the submitting user's display name (User.Name); not persisted, filled on read APIs such as GetByID.

completionMessage.description: CompletionMessage optional per-locale Markdown shown after survey submit (e.g. {"en":"...","ru":"..."}).

displayTheme.description: DisplayTheme optional JSON for counter-display terminal colors (see validateDisplayTheme).

idleScreen.description: IdleScreen optional JSON for counter idle carousel (text/image/video slides); see validateIdleScreen.

preRegistration.description: No DB FK: avoids AutoMigrate cycle with pre_registrations.ticket_id → tickets.id

servedByName.description: ServedByName is hydrated for client visit lists from ticket_histories (not stored on tickets).

serviceZoneId.description: ServiceZoneID: waiting pool within the subdivision; NULL = subdivision-wide pool.

transferTrail.description: TransferTrail lists ticket.transferred events in chronological order (client visit APIs only).

ttsUrl.description: URL to the generated TTS audio file

operations.description: Operations is hydrated for GET /units/{id} (kiosk freeze / EOD phase); not stored on units row.

definitions.description:
Definitions are visitor tags assigned to this client (excludes anonymous aggregate use in API).
Join table FKs are defined in SQL migrations (unit-scoped composites); constraint:false avoids duplicate AutoMigrate constraints.

billingMonth.description: month for aggregation (first day of month)

metricType.description: e.g. tickets_per_month (monthly ticket quota), matches plan limit keys

idleScreen.description: IdleScreen from the active survey for this counter (service zone scope first), regardless of ticket.

serviceZoneId.description: ServiceZoneID: when set, this counter serves only the waiting pool for that service_zone (direct child of UnitID).

token.description: Opaque tenant login token for strict-tenant links

exampleUrl.description: Example full login URL including the token query parameter

SessionCookie.name: quokkaq_refresh
SessionCookie.description: HttpOnly refresh JWT cookie (same-origin /api). When present, POST /auth/refresh does not require Authorization. POST /auth/logout clears this cookie (and the access cookie) via Set-Cookie. Legacy clients may still send Bearer refresh.

info.description: This is the backend API for QuokkaQ, rewritten in Go. Published docs are OpenAPI 3 (see /docs/openapi.json); annotations target Swagger 2 for swag, then converted.
info.title: QuokkaQ Go Backend API

get.description: Distinct tenants from unit assignments and company ownership. Optional query q searches name, legal name, INN, counterparty JSON.
get.summary: List companies the current user may access

post.description: Sends a password reset link to the user's email

Authenticates a user; refresh JWT is set only via HttpOnly `Set-Cookie` (SessionCookie). JSON returns access JWT (`token` duplicates `accessToken` for legacy clients). Optional `tenantSlug` scopes login to a tenant the user can access; omit for default behavior.

200.description: OK. Refresh session is carried by the `quokkaq_refresh` cookie (SessionCookie); JSON may still include access tokens for legacy clients.

Set-Cookie.description: When present, sets or rotates browser session cookies: `quokkaq_access` and `quokkaq_refresh` HttpOnly JWTs (Path=/; SameSite=Lax; Secure). Used after successful login or token refresh; the JSON body may still include access tokens for legacy clients (refresh only via cookies). See components.securitySchemes.SessionCookie.

get.summary: Resolve tenant context by opaque login token

post.summary: Resolve next login step from email (tenant hint)

post.description: Clears HttpOnly session cookies set by login and refresh. Does not require a JSON body.

Set-Cookie.description: Clears the browser session: `quokkaq_access` and `quokkaq_refresh` are typically sent as Set-Cookie with empty values and Max-Age=0 (or expired) so the browser drops them (HttpOnly, Path=/, SameSite=Lax, Secure). The header may be omitted if there was no session cookie.

get.description: Returns the currently authenticated user's information

post.description: Exchanges a valid refresh JWT for a new access JWT. The refresh token is read from HttpOnly session cookies when present; otherwise send `Authorization: Bearer <refresh>`. Rotated refresh tokens are returned only via `Set-Cookie`, not in the JSON body.

200.description: OK. Refresh session is carried by the `quokkaq_refresh` cookie (SessionCookie); JSON may still include access tokens for legacy clients.

Set-Cookie.description: When present, sets or rotates browser session cookies: `quokkaq_access` and `quokkaq_refresh` HttpOnly JWTs (Path=/; SameSite=Lax; Secure). Used after successful login or token refresh; the JSON body may still include access tokens for legacy clients (refresh only via cookies). See components.securitySchemes.SessionCookie.

post.description: Resets the user's password using a valid token

302.description: Redirect to app with one-time code

Location.description: Absolute or relative URL the client should follow (RFC 9110).

post.summary: SAML Assertion Consumer Service (POST from IdP)

get.summary: SAML SP metadata XML (register at IdP)

post.description: Register a new user and organization with trial subscription

Location.description: Absolute or relative URL the client should follow (RFC 9110).

get.summary: Start SSO (OIDC or SAML — redirect to IdP)

302.description: Redirect to app after OIDC callback

Location.description: Absolute or relative URL the client should follow (RFC 9110).

200.description: OK. Session cookies (`quokkaq_access`, `quokkaq_refresh`) are set as in POST /auth/login.

Set-Cookie.description: Sets the same session cookies as password login: `quokkaq_access` and `quokkaq_refresh` HttpOnly JWTs (Path=/; SameSite=Lax; Secure; refresh ~30d, access ~24h Max-Age). Returned together with the JSON body from this endpoint.

post.summary: Exchange one-time SSO code for JWT pair

302.description: Found — redirect only (no JSON body). Success: Location to return path with google_calendar_pick. Failures: Location to return path with google_calendar=error and reason (or equivalent query parameters).

Location.description: Where the browser should navigate next (success or error redirect target).

Streams image bytes. Requires Authorization: Bearer (staff user JWT or counter terminal JWT). This URL is not embeddable from unauthenticated contexts: plain , Markdown image syntax, or server-side markdown renderers without the token will fail. Clients should fetch with the Bearer token (e.g. browser fetch) and create an object/blob URL, or proxy the bytes with auth.

get.description: Retrieves all services for a specific unit

Paginated ticket history rows for tickets belonging to the unit (supervisor dashboard / journal). Limit is capped at 100. Optional filters: counterId (current ticket counter_id), userId (history actor), clientId, ticket (UUID or queue substring), q (search queue/id/visitor name), weekdays (comma-separated PostgreSQL DOW 0=Sun..6=Sat in unit timezone), dateFrom/dateTo (YYYY-MM-DD inclusive, history timestamp calendar date in unit timezone). counter_id reflects the ticket's current assignment, not necessarily the desk at event time. For users without full journal access (not admin/supervisor/platform_admin and no ACCESS_SUPERVISOR_PANEL on this unit), results are restricted to rows where the authenticated user is the history actor; userId filter is ignored/overridden in that case.

parameters.description: Filter by history actor user id
parameters.name: userId

parameters.description: Ticket UUID or queue number substring
parameters.name: ticket

get.summary: Tickets created in range grouped by business service (donut chart)

get.description:
Daily metrics from statistics warehouse; single calendar day without operator filter yields hourly points with per-hour recomputed wait/service/SLA (same rules as daily rollup). Requires unit branch access and statistics scope (self or ACCESS_STATISTICS_* / supervisor / admin).
Wait averages use queue time after the last ticket.transferred before the call. Service averages sum in_service episodes from ticket_histories (split by transfer / return-to-queue / recall / terminal status); warehouse service_count is the number of those segments with positive duration.

parameters.description: Service zone unit id (child of subdivision); omit for allowed scope default

get.summary: Per-operator utilization (serving vs idle/break), calendar days in subdivision TZ

post.description: Multipart file field "file". Returns an API-relative URL string. The GET for that path requires BearerAuth; it is not usable as a bare or static markdown image URL—clients must fetch with Authorization and use a blob/object URL (or proxy) to display.
post.summary: Upload guest survey completion markdown image

get.summary: List survey responses for a subdivision (requires ACCESS_SURVEY_RESPONSES)
List survey definitions for a scope unit

post.summary: Set survey as the active one for its scope

get.description: Subdivision: all non-EOD tickets for that unit (all service zones + subdivision-wide pool). Service zone: non-EOD tickets for the parent subdivision with service_zone_id equal to this zone's id.

post.description: Creates a new ticket for a service in a unit. Unit is taken from the path; body requires serviceId. Optional clientId (staff) or visitorPhone+visitorLocale (kiosk identification, en|ru); clientId and visitorPhone are mutually exclusive.

get.description: Returns label/color tag definitions scoped to the unit, ordered by sortOrder then label.
get.summary: List visitor tag definitions for a unit

post.description: Creates a tag definition (label + #RRGGBB color) for the unit.

delete.description: Deletes a tag definition; assignments on clients are removed (cascade).

patch.description: Partially updates a tag definition. Omitted fields are unchanged.

post.description: Upload kiosk/ad logo (JPG, PNG, SVG, WebP). Admin JWT. Stored under public/logos/.
Upload thermal-receipt logo (includes BMP). Admin JWT. Stored under public/printer-logos/.

Receives YooKassa HTTP notifications. Verifies HMAC-SHA256 using X-YooMoney-Signature, then processes payment.succeeded when metadata contains invoice_id (platform invoice paid flow).

parameters.description: Webhook HMAC-SHA256 digest (hex, optional sha256= prefix)
parameters.name: X-YooMoney-Signature
